Musical artist

**Sonny Phillips** (born December 7, 1936) is an American [jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") keyboardist. His primary instrument is [electronic organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ") but he often plays piano.

## Biography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sonny_Phillips&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Biography")]

Phillips began playing jazz organ after hearing [Jimmy Smith](/wiki/Jimmy_Smith_(musician) "Jimmy Smith (musician)") in his twenties. He studied under [Ahmad Jamal](/wiki/Ahmad_Jamal "Ahmad Jamal"), and played in the 1960s and 1970s with [Lou Donaldson](/wiki/Lou_Donaldson "Lou Donaldson"), [Nicky Hill](/wiki/Nicky_Hill "Nicky Hill"), [Eddie Harris](/wiki/Eddie_Harris "Eddie Harris"), [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person"), and [Gene Ammons](/wiki/Gene_Ammons "Gene Ammons"). His debut album was released in 1969, and he released several further records as a leader before suffering a long illness in 1980. He went into semi-retirement after this and moved to [Los Angeles](/wiki/Los_Angeles "Los Angeles"); since then he has performed and taught occasionally.

## Discography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sonny_Phillips&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Discography")]

### As leader

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sonny_Phillips&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: As leader")]

* *[Sure 'Nuff](/wiki/Sure_%27Nuff "Sure 'Nuff")* ([Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records"), 1969; reissued on BGP/[Ace](/wiki/Ace_Records_(United_Kingdom) "Ace Records (United Kingdom)") in 1993) -with [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person"), [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Boogaloo_Joe_Jones "Boogaloo Joe Jones")
* *[Black Magic!](/w/index.php?title=Black_Magic!_(Sonny_Phillips_album)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Black Magic! (Sonny Phillips album) (page does not exist)")* (Prestige, 1970; reissued on BGP/Ace in 1993)
* *[Black on Black!](/wiki/Black_on_Black! "Black on Black!")* (Prestige, 1970) -with [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant"), [Melvin Sparks](/wiki/Melvin_Sparks "Melvin Sparks")
* *My Black Flower* ([Muse](/wiki/Muse_Records "Muse Records"), 1976; reissued on [32 Jazz](/wiki/32_Jazz "32 Jazz") in 1999)
* *I Concentrate On You* (Muse, 1977)
* *Legends Of Acid Jazz: Sonny Phillips* (Prestige, 1997) (compilation of *Sure 'Nuff* + *Black On Black!*)

### As sideman

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sonny_Phillips&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: As sideman")]

**With [Gene Ammons](/wiki/Gene_Ammons "Gene Ammons")**

* *[The Boss Is Back!](/wiki/The_Boss_Is_Back! "The Boss Is Back!")* (Prestige, 1969)
* *[Brother Jug!](/wiki/Brother_Jug! "Brother Jug!")* (Prestige, 1969)
* *[Got My Own](/wiki/Got_My_Own "Got My Own")* (Prestige, 1972)
* *[Big Bad Jug](/wiki/Big_Bad_Jug "Big Bad Jug")* (Prestige, 1972)

**With [Rusty Bryant](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant "Rusty Bryant")**

* *[Rusty Bryant Returns](/wiki/Rusty_Bryant_Returns "Rusty Bryant Returns")* (Prestige, 1969)

**With [Billy Butler](/wiki/Billy_Butler_(guitarist) "Billy Butler (guitarist)")**

* *[Guitar Soul!](/wiki/Guitar_Soul! "Guitar Soul!")* (Prestige, 1969)
* *[Yesterday, Today & Tomorrow](/wiki/Yesterday,_Today_%26_Tomorrow_(Billy_Butler_album) "Yesterday, Today & Tomorrow (Billy Butler album)")* (Prestige, 1970)

**With [Eddie Harris](/wiki/Eddie_Harris "Eddie Harris")**

* *[Mean Greens](/wiki/Mean_Greens "Mean Greens")* (Atlantic, 1966)

**With [Willis Jackson](/wiki/Willis_Jackson_(saxophonist) "Willis Jackson (saxophonist)")**

* *[In the Alley](/wiki/In_the_Alley "In the Alley")* (Muse, 1976)

**With [Etta Jones](/wiki/Etta_Jones "Etta Jones")**

* *[If You Could See Me Now](/wiki/If_You_Could_See_Me_Now_(Etta_Jones_album) "If You Could See Me Now (Etta Jones album)")* (Muse, 1978)
* *Don't Misunderstand: Live In New York* (High Note, 1980)

**With [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones")**

* *[Boogaloo Joe](/wiki/Boogaloo_Joe "Boogaloo Joe")* (Prestige, 1969)
* *[No Way!](/wiki/No_Way! "No Way!")* (Prestige, 1970)
* *[Black Whip](/wiki/Black_Whip "Black Whip")* (Prestige, 1973)

**With [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person")**

* *[Goodness!](/wiki/Goodness! "Goodness!")* (Prestige, 1969)
* *[Truth!](/wiki/Truth! "Truth!")* (Prestige, 1970)
* *[Person to Person!](/wiki/Person_to_Person! "Person to Person!")* (Prestige, 1970)
* *[The Real Thing](/wiki/The_Real_Thing_(Houston_Person_album) "The Real Thing (Houston Person album)")* (Eastbound, 1973)
* *[Stolen Sweets](/wiki/Stolen_Sweets "Stolen Sweets")* (Muse, 1976)
* *[Wild Flower](/wiki/Wild_Flower_(Houston_Person_album) "Wild Flower (Houston Person album)")* (Muse, 1977)
* *[The Nearness of You](/wiki/The_Nearness_of_You_(Houston_Person_album) "The Nearness of You (Houston Person album)")* (Muse, 1977)
* *[Suspicions](/wiki/Suspicions_(album) "Suspicions (album)")* (Muse, 1980)

**With [Bernard Purdie](/wiki/Bernard_Purdie "Bernard Purdie")**

* *Coolin' 'N Groovin' (A Night At "On-Air")* (Lexington/West 47th, 1993)
